title: MPEG_gaussian_splatting_transport.shEncoding.mpegPerChannel
description: SH coefficients stored as per-channel SCALAR accessors. The DC term is excluded. Each channel contains 15 values per splat for degrees 1 to 3.

r.description: Accessor index for red channel coefficients (15 scalar values per splat).

g.description: Accessor index for green channel coefficients (15 scalar values per splat).

b.description: Accessor index for blue channel coefficients (15 scalar values per splat).
